title: Bungeons
description: An assortment of dungeons using Quark, Supplementaries, and Farmer's Delight
body:
Bungeons! A new datapack by yours truly, Bobisnotap! 
This adds several structures that may be of interest, from cute surface ruins (cliché, I know) to, well, dungeons.
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1019058742265913384/1059930713597685940/2022-11-26_13.51.38.png)
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1019058742265913384/1059930713987743754/2022-12-10_15.17.37.png)

This relies on Quark, Supplementaries, and Farmer's Delight! The blocks they add were used pretty heavily in this.

You can use this in modpacks/servers as long as this page is linked back to.
